series_metadata.series_description: Documents generated by the Department regarding a company in rehabilitation or other companies involving complete records collections for litigation purposes. Includes a detailed list and provilege logs. [See Attorney General before destroying.]

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year after the liquidation estate/case is settled and no pending litigation against the Department exists; then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 1 year after the liquidation estate/case is settled and no pending litigation against the Department exists; then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
